briefdescription.para: This routine is called when an OUT transaction for Endpoint Zero is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when IN transaction for Endpoint Zero is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a chapter 9 command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

simplesect.para: The setup request value to be processed by the upper layer.

briefdescription.para: This function executes the chapter 9 command processing.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

simplesect.para: The request value to be processed by the upper layer if the request is not handled. XST_SUCCESS if the request is successfully processed.

briefdescription.para: This function responds to the GET_INTERFACE command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This function responds to the SET_INTERFACE command.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the basic Control status words.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a GET_STATUS command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a GET_DESCRIPTOR command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a SET_DESCRIPTOR command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a GET_CONFIGURATION command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a SET_CONFIGURATION command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This routine is called when a SET_FEATURE or a CLEAR_FEATURE command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.
specifies whether it is a SET_FEATURE (TRUE)or a CLEAR_FEATURE (FALSE) command.

briefdescription.para: This routine copies the EP0 related data to the DPRAM.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XUsb instance of the controller.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the USB Chapter 9 related functions.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a hvm 2/22/07 First release 1.01a hvm 5/30/07 Moved the USB class specific command processing to application files. 3.00a hvm 11/18/09 Updated to use HAL processor APIs. XUsb_mReadReg is renamed to XUsb_ReadReg and XUsb_mWriteReg is renamed to XUsb_WriteReg. 3.02a hvm 08/16/10 Updated with the little endian support changes. 4.00a hvm 12/20/10 Updated SetInterface function with microphone case support.
